name: Morphous Flamingo
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible graceful hospitality system to be coded from the Flamingo light and dark design-system boards: pink feather actions, coral focus, salt-white surfaces, lagoon-blue navigation, and warm plume depth. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for elegant service UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for hospitality labels, headings, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Airy 8px grids, plume-soft panels, lagoon dividers, reservation cards, and calm service dashboards.
